reflection_response:
```component: label::automatic_top_up
Use this category for queries specifically about setting up, enabling, disabling, or managing automated top-up features that add funds to an account on a schedule or when the balance drops below a certain amount. Do not use for general questions on manual top-ups, top-ups by card, or one-time fund additions.
```

proposed.label::automatic_top_up: Use this category for queries specifically about setting up, enabling, disabling, or managing automated top-up features that add funds to an account on a schedule or when the balance drops below a certain amount. Do not use for general questions on manual top-ups, top-ups by card, or one-time fund additions.

reflection_response:
```component: label::balance_not_updated_after_bank_transfer
Questions or issues where someone has made a bank transfer but their account balance does not yet reflect the incoming funds. Use this category if the user is asking about delays, missing funds, or when a transfer will appear in their account after initiating or expecting a bank transfer—especially when they are concerned the money has not arrived or is not showing. Do not use for general timing questions about how long transfers take before initiation; those go to transfer_timing.
```

proposed.label::balance_not_updated_after_bank_tr: Questions or issues where someone has made a bank transfer but their account balance does not yet reflect the incoming funds. Use this category if the user is asking about delays, missing funds, or when a transfer will appear in their account after initiating or expecting a bank transfer—especially when they are concerned the money has not arrived or is not showing. Do not use for general timing questions about how long transfers take before initiation; those go to transfer_timing.

reflection_response:
```component: label::beneficiary_not_allowed
Issues where a transfer cannot be made to a specific recipient or account because that beneficiary is blocked, restricted, or not allowed by policy or system rules. Applies when the problem is with the eligibility or status of the recipient, not a general transfer failure or delays. If the user's complaint is about inability to transfer to a certain person or account, use this category.
```

proposed.label::beneficiary_not_allowed: Issues where a transfer cannot be made to a specific recipient or account because that beneficiary is blocked, restricted, or not allowed by policy or system rules. Applies when the problem is with the eligibility or status of the recipient, not a general transfer failure or delays. If the user's complaint is about inability to transfer to a certain person or account, use this category.

reflection_response:
```component: label::cancel_transfer
Belongs to this category if the text is about wanting to stop, reverse, or prevent a bank transfer that has already been initiated or is pending. Assign here when the main concern is cancelling or undoing the sending of money via transfer—not card payments or top-ups. Exclude requests about reverting a transfer after it is completed (use 'failed_transfer' or 'top_up_reverted' if money returns automatically).
```

proposed.label::cancel_transfer: Belongs to this category if the text is about wanting to stop, reverse, or prevent a bank transfer that has already been initiated or is pending. Assign here when the main concern is cancelling or undoing the sending of money via transfer—not card payments or top-ups. Exclude requests about reverting a transfer after it is completed (use 'failed_transfer' or 'top_up_reverted' if money returns automatically).

Select this category when a user's attempt to add money to their account (top-up) is still processing, has not been completed, or is awaiting confirmation. ```

Select this category when the user is asking about receiving, getting paid, or being credited with money by someone else, including salary or payments in any currency.
